notes: Safe-bumps the Drive Mode HOS patch so service worker version matches the app version and update detection is reliable.
Adds a Motive-style Drive Mode screen for manual DRIVING status.
Adds pure advisory HOS clock calculation from manual duty-status events across days.
Prevents 11-hour, 14-hour, break, and cycle clocks from resetting at midnight.
Keeps split sleeper clocks disabled until full paired-period support is implemented.
Does not add GPS auto-driving or automatic driving events, and does not change existing duty event times.
label: v95.82 Drive Mode HOS clocks safe bump
